value.found_quote:
Agents overview
Stay organized with collections
Save and categorize content based on your preferences.
Build, deploy, and manage AI agents that use reasoning and tools to perform complex enterprise tasks, such as automating workflows, discovering information across multiple systems, and generating content.
value.rationale: The page directly matches the claim text verbatim, including the "Agents overview," "Stay organized with collections," "Save and categorize content based on your preferences," and "Build, deploy, and manage AI agents that use reasoning and tools to perform complex enterprise tasks, such as automating workflows, discovering information across multiple systems" language. The page also explicitly notes that this feature is in Preview: "Preview. This feature is subject to the 'Pre-GA Offerings Terms' in the General Service Terms section of the Service Specific Terms." Additionally, the page describes "Managed Agents API on Agent Platform" as one of the development paths, confirming the existence of Google-managed agents.
